meaning: n.玻璃(或玻璃器皿等)制造(术)
examples: Glassmaking at this time was almost entirely utilitarian.
In 1868, when the industry was still struggling to re-establish other forms of glassmaking, 3, 662 tons of beads were exported.

Most importantly, he inspired people to experiment with glassmaking as art.
